review_command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --tools Read,Grep,Glob --permission-mode dontAsk --output-format json

findings.title: Evidence state must not appear passed before review artifacts exist
findings.summary: Follow-up review flagged that the contract gate looked passed while claude-review-result.json was absent. This artifact, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, and the production_ready promotion reconcile that evidence state before commit.

findings.title: Add direct non-object reviewGate coverage
findings.summary: Added null and truthy non-object reviewGate checks in both model tests and the RP00 validator.

findings.title: Make numeric tenantContext assertion precise
findings.summary: Narrowed the model-test regex to /must provide tenant_id/ for numeric tenantContext rejection and retained validator fail-closed coverage.

findings.title: Declarative requiredWhen enforcement
findings.summary: Accepted as non-blocking because S03 is the field-definition slice; packet evaluation runtime remains a later implementation concern.

findings.title: Future-tense gate wording before promotion
findings.summary: Accepted only while implemented; production_ready promotion updates artifacts and final validation evidence before commit.

P2.title: Evidence state consistency for Claude review gate
P2.resolution: Created claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json before promotion; production_ready status and final validation evidence are updated in the same closeout tranche.

P3.title: Direct truthy non-object reviewGate branch coverage
P3.resolution: Added assertClaudeReviewGateTenantScope(42, null) model-test coverage and a truthy non-object reviewGate vector to the RP00 validator.

P3.title: Numeric tenantContext assertion should target the exact context error
P3.resolution: Changed the model-test assertion to /must provide tenant_id/.

P3.title: Declarative requiredWhen enforcement is not runtime-enforced in S03
P3.resolution: No code change; S03 defines the field contract, while packet-level runtime enforcement remains outside this subphase.

followup_reviews.reason: P3 test-depth hardening changed tests and validator after the initial review.
followup_reviews.review_command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --tools Read,Grep,Glob --permission-mode dontAsk --output-format json

P2: Evidence artifacts were still pending at review time.
P3: Truthy non-object reviewGate direct branch coverage was recommended.
Numeric tenantContext assertion regex was recommended to be more precise.

followup_review_reason: Initial and follow-up claude-opus-4-8 max read-only reviews completed; remaining findings were fixed or accepted before production_ready promotion.
